canConnect.description: Checks whether the modulation connection can be made.

clearAllConnections.description: Removes all connections for the given target (or all connections if no target is specified).

connect.signature: bool connect(String sourceId, String targetId, bool addConnection)
connect.description: Adds (or removes) a connection from the source to the target.

fromBase64.description: Loads the state from a previously exported Base64 string.

getComponent.description: Get the component reference for the given modulation target ID.

getConnectionProperty.signature: var getConnectionProperty(String sourceId, String targetId, String propertyId)
getConnectionProperty.description: Returns the property of a modulation connection.

getMatrixModulationProperties.description: Returns a JSON object with the current matrix modulation properties.

getModulationDisplayData.description: Returns a JSON object with the visualisation data for the given modulation target.

getSourceList.description: Return a list of all sources.

getTargetId.description: Get the target ID (either ID of the matrix modulator or matrixTargetId property) for the given component.

getTargetList.description: Return a list of all targets.

setConnectionCallback.description: Set a callback that will be executed whenever the matrix state changes.

setConnectionProperty.signature: bool setConnectionProperty(String sourceId, String targetId, String propertyId, var value)
setConnectionProperty.description: Sets the property of a modulation connection (with undo).

setDragCallback.description: Attaches a callback to be notified wheneve a modulation connection is being dragged.

setEditCallback.description: Set a callback that will be executed when the user clicks on "Edit connections".

setMatrixModulationProperties.description: Sets the global properties for the matrix modulation system.

setSourceSelectionCallback.description: Attaches a callback to be notified whenever a new modulation source is selected.

toBase64.description: Creates a Base64 string of all connections.
